text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 241 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_DAILY 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Split Network Standard Retail — 1 day supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a one-day supply of the drugs on this tier, 
using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within 
a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL)
